tagged_story_for_tts: <[silence:3400ms]>Building blocks of words. <[silence:1300ms]> Tiny meanings inside bigger ones.<[silence:1300ms]>"Word roots" are the core parts of words—like seeds that grow into families of related terms.<[silence:700ms]> Think of them as Lego bricks:<[silence:700ms]> "Bio" (life) snaps onto "-graphy" (writing) to make "biography"—a life story.<[silence:1300ms]>"Aqua" (water) flows into "aquarium," "aqueduct," and "subaqueous."<[silence:700ms]> Roots often come from Latin or Greek, languages that built the scaffolding for modern science, law, and medicine.<[silence:1300ms]>"Spect" (look) hides in "inspect," "spectator," and "perspective."<[silence:700ms]> "Tele" (far) stretches across "telescope," "telephone," and "teleport."<[silence:1300ms]>Knowing just 20 roots unlocks thousands of words.<[silence:700ms]> Example:<[silence:700ms]> "Auto" (self) + "mobile" (moving) = a car that moves by itself.<[silence:700ms]> "Hydro" (water) + "phobia" (fear) = fear of water.<[silence:1300ms]>Three related subjects are language evolution, prefixes suffixes, and etymology maps.<[silence:1200ms]>
clean_story: Building blocks of words.  Tiny meanings inside bigger ones. "Word roots" are the core parts of words—like seeds that grow into families of related terms. Think of them as Lego bricks: "Bio" (life) snaps onto "-graphy" (writing) to make "biography"—a life story. "Aqua" (water) flows into "aquarium," "aqueduct," and "subaqueous. " Roots often come from Latin or Greek, languages that built the scaffolding for modern science, law, and medicine. "Spect" (look) hides in "inspect," "spectator," and "perspective. " "Tele" (far) stretches across "telescope," "telephone," and "teleport. "Knowing just 20 roots unlocks thousands of words. Example: "Auto" (self) + "mobile" (moving) = a car that moves by itself. "Hydro" (water) + "phobia" (fear) = fear of water. Three related subjects are language evolution, prefixes suffixes, and etymology maps.
